title: Toward A Public Science of Model Behavior
summary: Toward A Public Science of Model Behavior
whyItMatters: This is a linkpost for our essay "Toward A Public Science of Model Behavior" on transluce.org . The full text is reproduced below. Today’s AI systems frequently behave in ways their developers did not anticipate or intend. Furthermore, as these systems become increasingly capable and widely deployed , these unexpected behaviors can have real consequences. I…
